notes: Module 4 Therapist Integration beachhead — Clinical Partnership. Consent-gated briefs; therapist account lists linked clients who granted therapist_share. LifeOS consent foundation is a dependency.

steps.task: Create therapist_profiles, therapist_client_links, and session_briefs tables (IF NOT EXISTS) for Wellness Studio Module 4.
steps.spec: SQL only. Idempotent CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for: therapist_profiles(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id bigint NOT NULL UNIQUE, display_name text, approach text, session_frequency text, focus_areas jsonb default '[]'::jsonb, crisis_contact text, created_at timestamptz default now()); therapist_client_links(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), therapist_user_id bigint NOT NULL, client_user_id bigint NOT NULL, status text default 'pending', client_consented_at timestamptz, created_at timestamptz default now(), UNIQUE(therapist_user_id, client_user_id)); session_briefs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), client_user_id bigint NOT NULL, therapist_user_id bigint, period_start date, period_end date, brief_json jsonb NOT NULL, client_reviewed_at timestamptz, shared_at timestamptz, created_at timestamptz default now()). No DROP. No ALTER that destroys data.

steps.task: Therapist integration service: upsertTherapistProfile, linkClient, listLinkedClients, createSessionBrief, markBriefReviewed, shareBriefIfConsented.
steps.spec: ESM. Export createWellnessTherapistService({ pool, consentRegistry }). shareBriefIfConsented MUST call consentRegistry.hasConsent(clientUserId, 'therapist_share') and refuse without grant. Never return raw chat transcripts — only brief_json. Parameterised SQL only. No browser globals. @ssot docs/products/wellness-studio/PRODUCT_HOME.md

steps.task: Express surface for therapist profile, client links, and consent-gated brief share. Export registerWellnessTherapistRoutes(app, deps).
steps.spec: ESM export registerWellnessTherapistRoutes(app, deps) with deps={pool, requireAuth, consentRegistry}. Mount under /api/v1/wellness/therapist: POST /profile, GET /profile/me, POST /links, GET /clients (therapist|admin), POST /briefs, POST /briefs/:id/share. Share path uses shareBriefIfConsented. JSON only. No browser globals. @ssot docs/products/wellness-studio/PRODUCT_HOME.md
steps.last_error: route module not auto-registered — add {"path":"routes/wellness-therapist-routes.js","register":"<registerFn>","enabled":true} to config/auto-registered-product-modules.json so the endpoint actually mounts LIVE (built + deployed but unreachable = false done)

steps.task: Auto-register wellness therapist routes at boot without editing server.js.
steps.spec: Add {"path":"routes/wellness-therapist-routes.js","register":"registerWellnessTherapistRoutes","enabled":true} to modules[]. Preserve all existing entries. File must remain valid JSON.

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wellness_studio_sessions with columns: id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid NOT NULL, session_type text NOT NULL, joy_checkin_id uuid REFERENCES joy_checkins(id), integrity_score_log_id uuid REFERENCES integrity_score_log(id), wearable_data_id uuid REFERENCES wearable_data(id), emotional_pattern_id uuid REFERENCES emotional_patterns(id), session_notes text, status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(). CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wellness_studio_insights with columns: id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid NOT NULL, session_id uuid REFERENCES wellness_studio_sessions(id), insight_type text NOT NULL, content jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', confidence_score numeric(4,3), created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(). All constraints use IF NOT EXISTS guards; zero DROP or ALTER statements.

steps.task: Create data-access service for wellness studio sessions and insights
steps.spec: Exports getSessionsByUser(userId, db), createSession(payload, db), updateSession(sessionId, patch, db), getInsightsBySession(sessionId, db), createInsight(payload, db). All functions return promises, accept a pg db pool as last arg, query only wellness_studio_sessions and wellness_studio_insights plus read-only joins to joy_checkins, integrity_score_log, wearable_data, emotional_patterns. No top-level browser globals. No AI imports.

steps.task: Create AI insight generation service using callCouncilMember
steps.spec: Exports async generateWellnessInsight(userId, sessionContext, callCouncilMember) which builds a structured prompt from sessionContext fields (joy_score, integrity_score, wearable_summary, emotional_pattern), calls callCouncilMember('wellness-coach', prompt), parses the response into {insight_type, content, confidence_score}, and returns that object. No direct AI SDK imports. No browser globals.

steps.task: Create orchestrator that ties data access, AI insights, and therapist integration
steps.spec: Exports async runWellnessSession(userId, sessionType, deps) where deps = {db, callCouncilMember, wellnessTherapist}. Imports wellness-studio-data.js and wellness-studio-ai.js from sibling paths. Calls createSession, then generateWellnessInsight, then createInsight, then optionally calls deps.wellnessTherapist.notifyIfNeeded(userId, insight) if that method exists. Returns {session, insight}. No browser globals.

steps.task: Create Express route module for wellness studio API endpoints
steps.spec: Exports registerWellnessStudioRoutes(app, deps) where deps = {db, callCouncilMember, wellnessTherapist}. Mounts: GET /api/wellness-studio/sessions (returns sessions for req.user.id), POST /api/wellness-studio/sessions (calls orchestrator.runWellnessSession), GET /api/wellness-studio/sessions/:sessionId/insights (returns insights). Imports wellness-studio-orchestrator.js and wellness-studio-data.js by relative path. All routes require authenticated req.user. Returns JSON. No browser globals. No top-level side effects.

steps.task: Auto-register wellness studio routes at boot without editing server.js
steps.spec: Add {"path":"routes/wellness-studio-routes.js","register":"registerWellnessStudioRoutes","enabled":true} to modules[]. Preserve all existing entries. File must remain valid JSON.

steps.task: Create founder-gated wellness studio dashboard overlay UI
steps.spec: Self-contained HTML file with inline CSS and inline JS (no external script tags beyond the page's own asset conventions). Renders a wellness session launcher with session type selector, a start-session button that POSTs to /api/wellness-studio/sessions, and a panel that displays returned insight content and confidence score. Uses fetch inside inline script tags only. No server-side imports. Passes founder design review: uses existing CSS variable palette, branded header 'Wellness Studio', accessible labels.
steps.note: Un-gated 2026-07-15 per Adam never-idle order — no founder gating, BOS will attempt with default spec or skip if blocked.

steps.task: Create one-time backfill script to seed wellness sessions from existing table data
steps.spec: ES module script. Imports pg from 'pg', reads DATABASE_URL from process.env, queries users who have joy_checkins or integrity_score_log entries but no wellness_studio_sessions row in the last 30 days, and inserts a seed session of type 'onboarding-backfill' for each via parameterised INSERT. Logs count of rows created to stdout. No AI calls. No browser globals. Designed to be run once via node scripts/wellness-studio-backfill.mjs.
